qa_story.title: As a new user, I should be able to register using a valid email and password so that I can create an account in the system
acceptance_criteria: User can submit a registration form with email and password
System creates a new account with the provided email and password
User receives confirmation that registration was successful

test_scenarios.title: Successful registration with valid email and password
test_scenarios.expected_result: User account is created and registration success is confirmed

test_scenarios.title: Registration with an already registered email
steps: Enter an email that is already registered
test_scenarios.expected_result: System rejects registration and informs the user that the email is already in use

test_scenarios.title: Registration with empty email field
test_scenarios.expected_result: System rejects registration and prompts the user to provide an email

test_scenarios.title: Registration with empty password field
test_scenarios.expected_result: System rejects registration and prompts the user to provide a password

edge_cases.description: User submits registration form with both email and password fields empty
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects registration and prompts for both required fields

edge_cases.description: User submits registration with an invalid email format
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects registration and informs the user the email format is invalid

qa_story.title: As a registered user, I should be able to verify my email so that I am allowed to log in to the system
acceptance_criteria: After registration, user must verify their email before logging in
Unverified users are not allowed to log in
Verified users are allowed to proceed to login

test_scenarios.title: Login attempt by an unverified user
steps: Register a new account with valid email and password
Attempt to log in with the registered email and password
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies login and informs the user that email verification is required

test_scenarios.title: Successful login after email verification
steps: Register a new account with valid email and password
Attempt to log in with the registered email and password
test_scenarios.expected_result: System allows the user to log in successfully

test_scenarios.title: Email verification completes successfully
steps: Register a new account with valid email and password
test_scenarios.expected_result: System marks the user's email as verified

edge_cases.description: User attempts to verify email with an invalid or expired verification token
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects verification and informs the user the token is invalid or expired

edge_cases.description: User attempts to verify an email that is already verified
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System acknowledges the email is already verified

qa_story.title: As a registered and verified user, I should be able to log in using my email and correct password so that I can access the system
acceptance_criteria: Registered and verified users can log in with their email and correct password
System authenticates the user based on the provided credentials
Successful login grants the user access to the system

test_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid email and correct password
steps: Enter a registered and verified email
test_scenarios.expected_result: User is authenticated and granted access to the system

test_scenarios.title: Login with incorrect password
steps: Enter a registered and verified email
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies login and informs the user that the credentials are invalid

test_scenarios.title: Login with unregistered email
steps: Enter an email that is not registered
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies login and informs the user that the credentials are invalid

test_scenarios.title: Login with empty email and password fields
steps: Leave email and password fields empty
test_scenarios.expected_result: System rejects the login attempt and prompts the user to provide credentials

edge_cases.description: User enters correct email but leaves password field empty
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects login and prompts the user to enter a password

edge_cases.description: User enters correct password but leaves email field empty
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects login and prompts the user to enter an email

qa_story.title: As a logged-in user, I should have a session created and maintained so that my authenticated state persists while I use the system
acceptance_criteria: A user session is created upon successful login
The session is maintained while the user interacts with the system
The user remains authenticated throughout the active session

test_scenarios.title: Session is created after successful login
steps: Check the system for an active session
test_scenarios.expected_result: An active session exists for the logged-in user

test_scenarios.title: Session persists across user interactions
steps: Navigate to different areas of the system
test_scenarios.expected_result: User remains logged in and session is maintained throughout interactions

test_scenarios.title: No session is created on failed login
steps: Attempt to log in with invalid credentials
Check the system for an active session
test_scenarios.expected_result: No session is created for the failed login attempt

edge_cases.description: User opens multiple browser tabs after login
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Session is maintained and the user remains authenticated across all tabs

qa_story.title: As a logged-in user, I should be able to log out of the system so that my session is invalidated and my account is secured
acceptance_criteria: User can initiate a logout action
Upon logout, the user's session is invalidated
After logout, the user can no longer access authenticated areas without logging in again

test_scenarios.title: Successful logout invalidates session
test_scenarios.expected_result: User's session is invalidated and user is logged out

test_scenarios.title: Access to authenticated area after logout
steps: Attempt to access an authenticated area
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies access and requires the user to log in again

test_scenarios.title: Session token is invalid after logout
steps: Attempt to use the old session token
test_scenarios.expected_result: System rejects the old session token as invalid

edge_cases.description: User clicks logout multiple times in quick succession
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System handles the request gracefully without errors and the session remains invalidated

qa_story.title: As a user who has forgotten my password, I should be able to request a password reset using my registered email and set a new password so that I can regain access to my account
acceptance_criteria: User can request a password reset by providing their registered email
System sends a password reset mechanism to the registered email
User can set a new password through the reset process
User can log in with the new password after reset

test_scenarios.title: Successful password reset request with registered email
steps: Navigate to the password reset page
test_scenarios.expected_result: System acknowledges the request and initiates the password reset process for the provided email

test_scenarios.title: Set a new password after reset request
steps: Request a password reset with a registered email
test_scenarios.expected_result: System updates the password and confirms the new password has been set

test_scenarios.title: Login with new password after reset
steps: Complete the password reset and set a new password
Attempt to log in with the registered email and the new password
test_scenarios.expected_result: User is able to log in successfully with the new password

test_scenarios.title: Login with old password after reset
steps: Complete the password reset and set a new password
Attempt to log in with the registered email and the old password
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies login with the old password

test_scenarios.title: Password reset request with unregistered email
steps: Navigate to the password reset page
Enter an email that is not registered
test_scenarios.expected_result: System does not initiate a reset for an unregistered email

edge_cases.description: User requests multiple password resets in quick succession
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System handles multiple requests gracefully; only the latest reset process should be valid

edge_cases.description: User attempts to use an expired or already-used password reset token
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System rejects the token and informs the user it is invalid or expired

qa_story.title: As a system administrator, I should be able to enforce session expiry after a period of inactivity so that idle user accounts are secured
acceptance_criteria: User sessions expire after a period of inactivity
After session expiry, the user must log in again to access the system
Active sessions that are in use do not expire prematurely

test_scenarios.title: Session expires after inactivity
steps: Remain inactive for the defined inactivity period
Attempt to perform an action in the system
test_scenarios.expected_result: System denies the action and informs the user that the session has expired

test_scenarios.title: User must log in again after session expiry
steps: Allow the session to expire due to inactivity
Attempt to access an authenticated area
test_scenarios.expected_result: System requires the user to log in again

test_scenarios.title: Active session does not expire while user is active
steps: Continuously interact with the system within the inactivity period
test_scenarios.expected_result: Session remains active and the user stays authenticated

edge_cases.description: User becomes inactive just before the expiry threshold and then performs an action exactly at the threshold
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System handles the boundary condition consistently, either allowing or denying based on whether the threshold was reached

edge_cases.description: Session expires while the user is in the middle of submitting a form
edge_cases.expected_behavior: System informs the user the session has expired and does not process the submission
